# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
    S3BucketForUploadsAndBackups:
        Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
        Properties:
            BucketName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-upload-bucket # a unique name for the bucket. It'll get replaced by CloudFormation in later iterations, hence versioning and lifecycle rules will be added here as well 
          ... (rest of properties omitted)
